ops.title: ship double-run leaves an empty duplicate commit on main
ops.description: Two instances in two days of an agent re-running ship after an ambiguous first outcome, cutting an EMPTY duplicate commit that gets pushed: captain-hook afda278c (2026-07-14, agent misread notification timing) and cc-pool 4c738cc1 (2026-07-14, empty dup of b79752dd with identical message, 49 min apart). Ship happily commits an empty @ and pushes it. Likely fix: when @ is empty (with paths: fileset matches nothing), refuse with 'nothing to commit — did a prior ship already land <sha>?' instead of cutting an empty commit.

ops.text: running ccx vcs ship with an empty working copy refuses instead of creating an empty commit
